heading: Agreements
label: 9518 Agreements
text: The Institute may carry out research projects of common interest with entities such as the National Science Foundation and the Eunice Kennedy Shriver National Institute of Child Health and Human Development through agreements with such entities that are in accordance with .section 1231 of this title
notes: Change of Name“Eunice Kennedy Shriver National Institute of Child Health and Human Development” substituted for “National Institute of Child Health and Human Development” in text, on authority of , set out as a note under , The Public Health and Welfare.section 1(d) of Pub. L. 110–154section 285g of Title 42
